name: read-lines
description: Show first 200 lines, a single line, or a line range from a file. Supports multiple files. Use --numbered/-n to add line numbers.

parameters.name: --numbered or -n
parameters.description: Prefix output with line numbers (uses nl -ba).

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Path to the file (or multiple files for head of each).

examples.expected: Lines 30-60 of file with line numbers.

cost_saving_rationale: Replaces multi-step nl/sed pipelines with a single command, reducing tool calls.
